```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.5em;">the durable triad</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em 0.95em;border-top:4px solid #2C8475;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);position:relative;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">role 01</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Planner</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;color:#D4ECDB;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">📋</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    Expand prompt → detailed spec.
   </div>
   <div style="background:#F8FBFA;border-left:3px solid #2C8475;padding:0.4em 0.6em;font-size:0.5em;color:#1F5E54;font-style:italic;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
    Base model under-specifies when implementing.
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em 0.95em;border-top:4px solid #C4881A;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.12);position:relative;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">role 02</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Generator</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;color:#FAE9C8;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">⚙</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    Do the actual work.
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FFFBF0;border-left:3px solid #C4881A;padding:0.4em 0.6em;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A5410;font-style:italic;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
    Focused execution. No judgment burden.
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em 0.95em;border-top:4px solid #D45F47;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);position:relative;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">role 03</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;">Evaluator</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;color:#FAD9D2;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">⚖</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    Independently grade output.
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FCEEEC;border-left:3px solid #D45F47;padding:0.4em 0.6em;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;font-style:italic;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;">
    Generators inflate scores when grading themselves.
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-style:italic;">
  "agents reliably skew positive when grading their own work."
 </div>

</div>
```
